summary: Completed frontend testing of 8 customer UI refinement requests. All major features are working correctly including: persistent sidebar with smooth animations, gender tag in brackets format, removed price indicator and booking button, smaller card height, and image carousel with arrows and indicator dots.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'My Profile' in sidebar shows toast 'Profile coming soon' instead of navigating to /profile route which exists

action_items: Consider updating CustomerLayout.js line 23 to navigate to /profile instead of showing toast, since the route exists
critical_code_review_comments: SalonSelectionPage.js line 49: useEffect has missing dependencies 'getUserLocation' and 'navigate' - ESLint warning
CustomerLayout.js: My Profile action shows toast instead of navigating to existing /profile route - inconsistent with other menu items

test_credentials.user_login: Any name (e.g., 'Test User'), phone: 9876543210, gender: Men/Women

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 UI changes verified working: 1) Persistent sidebar with CustomerLayout wrapper on /salons, /history, /profile pages 2) Smooth sidebar animations with framer-motion 3) Default route '/' redirects to '/salons' (then to login if not authenticated) 4) Salon cards have h-32 image height 5) Gender tag displays in brackets after salon name 6) No ₹₹ price indicator 7) No 'Book Now via App' button 8) Image carousel with left/right arrows visible on hover and indicator dots. Note: Hamburger button click requires JavaScript click() for reliable triggering in Playwright tests.

sidebar_persistence.details: Hamburger menu button visible and functional on /salons, /history, /profile pages

sidebar_animations.details: Smooth open/close with framer-motion, backdrop visible

default_route_redirect.details: '/' redirects to '/salons', then to '/user/login' if not authenticated

smaller_card_height.details: Cards use h-32 for image section

gender_tag_format.details: Gender tag displays in brackets after salon name (e.g., 'The Looks Unisex Salon (Unisex)')

price_indicator_removed.details: ₹₹ price indicator not present on cards

booking_button_removed.details: 'Book Now via App' button not present on cards

image_carousel.details: Left/right arrows visible on hover, indicator dots at bottom, carousel navigation works
